import re


def redact(text):
    # Emails: keep first char of local part and domain
    def mask_email(m):
        local, domain = m.group(1), m.group(2)
        return local[0] + "***@" + domain

    text = re.sub(r"([A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+)@([A-Za-z0-9.-]+\.[A-Za-z]{2,})", mask_email, text)

    # Bearer tokens
    text = re.sub(r"Bearer\s+\S+", "Bearer [REDACTED]", text)

    # sk-style API keys: keep prefix and last 4 chars
    def mask_sk(m):
        key = m.group(0)
        return "sk-..." + key[-4:]

    text = re.sub(r"sk-[A-Za-z0-9]+", mask_sk, text)

    # 16-digit card numbers: keep first 4 and last 4
    def mask_card(m):
        num = m.group(0)
        return num[:4] + "********" + num[-4:]

    text = re.sub(r"\b\d{16}\b", mask_card, text)

    return text
